name: char-unit-prefix-stripping
description: P0: w:left=720, w:startChars=200, w:endChars=100, tab at 1440, text '(a)\tBody text...'. P1: same indent, no prefix (control).
expected_behavior: P0 after prefix stripping: start_chars=200, end_chars=100 must survive. GAP-101 bug: prefix stripping branch hardcodes start_chars=None, end_chars=None.
